name: innovation-cycle
prompt: Minimal innovation process. White background. Four squares arranged in clockwise pattern connected by thin curved grey arrows: "Observe" → "Ideate" → "Build" → "Measure" → (back to Observe). Each square is just text, no borders. One square ("Build") in ember orange (#D95B43), others in charcoal. Center of arrangement has small grey text "Iterate". Very clean, lots of padding. Flat design inspired by Material Design principles.
